rationale.R1.2: Identifies a core contradiction and several unsupported claims, providing detailed reasoning.
rationale.RX.1: Walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs.
rationale.RX.3: Covers exactly the agreed J*(d) without any drift or additional scope.
rationale.RX.4: Highlights potential downstream harms but does not introduce new errors or fabrications.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, though some details are inferred.
